'''âm-h-m''' ('''kamaham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unask|unask]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unask|unask]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-h-m
|-
! Lemma
| kamaham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimaham|thimaham]] || [[word:jimaham|jimaham]] || [[word:shimaham|shimaham]] || [[word:kimaham|kimaham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumaham|thuthumaham]] || [[word:jujumaham|jujumaham]] || [[word:shushumaham|shushumaham]] || [[word:kukumaham|kukumaham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumaham|thumaham]] || [[word:jumaham|jumaham]] || [[word:shumaham|shumaham]] || [[word:kumaham|kumaham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumaham|thumaham]] || [[word:jumaham|jumaham]] || [[word:shumaham|shumaham]] || [[word:kumaham|kumaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themaham|themaham]] || [[word:jemaham|jemaham]] || [[word:shemaham|shemaham]] || [[word:kemaham|kemaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomaham|thothomaham]] || [[word:jojomaham|jojomaham]] || [[word:shoshomaham|shoshomaham]] || [[word:kokomaham|kokomaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomaham|thomaham]] || [[word:jomaham|jomaham]] || [[word:shomaham|shomaham]] || [[word:komaham|komaham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomaham|thomaham]] || [[word:jomaham|jomaham]] || [[word:shomaham|shomaham]] || [[word:komaham|komaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmaham|thĂŠmaham]] || [[word:jĂŠmaham|jĂŠmaham]] || [[word:shĂŠmaham|shĂŠmaham]] || [[word:kĂŠmaham|kĂŠmaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamaham|thathamaham]] || [[word:jajamaham|jajamaham]] || [[word:shashamaham|shashamaham]] || [[word:kakamaham|kakamaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamaham|thamaham]] || [[word:jamaham|jamaham]] || [[word:shamaham|shamaham]] || [[word:kamaham|kamaham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamaham|thamaham]] || [[word:jamaham|jamaham]] || [[word:shamaham|shamaham]] || [[word:kamaham|kamaham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamaham|shamaham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamaham|goshamaham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamaham|gokishamaham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamahamnĂŒ|shamahamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamahamnknĂŒ|goshamahamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahamnĂŒ|gokishamahamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamahamshĂ«|shamahamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamahamnkshĂ«|goshamahamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamahamshĂ«|gokishamahamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahamro|shamahamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahamnkro|goshamahamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahamro|gokishamahamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahamu|shamahamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahamnkmu|goshamahamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahamu|gokishamahamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamahamsher|shamahamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamahamnksher|goshamahamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamahamsher|gokishamahamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamahamng|shamahamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamahamnkng|goshamahamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamahamng|gokishamahamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamahamya|shamahamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamahamnkya|goshamahamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamahamya|gokishamahamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamahamyam|shamahamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamahamnkyam|goshamahamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamahamyam|gokishamahamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahamnĂŒshĂ«|shamahamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamahamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamahamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahamnĂŒro|shamahamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahamnknĂŒro|goshamahamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahamnĂŒro|gokishamahamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahamnĂŒmu|shamahamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahamnknĂŒmu|goshamahamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahamnĂŒmu|gokishamahamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahamshĂ«nĂŒ|shamahamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamahamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamahamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahamshĂ«ro|shamahamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahamnkshĂ«ro|goshamahamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahamshĂ«ro|gokishamahamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahamshĂ«mu|shamahamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahamnkshĂ«mu|goshamahamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahamshĂ«mu|gokishamahamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahamronĂŒ|shamahamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahamnkronĂŒ|goshamahamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahamronĂŒ|gokishamahamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahamroshĂ«|shamahamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahamnkroshĂ«|goshamahamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahamroshĂ«|gokishamahamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahamromu|shamahamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahamnkromu|goshamahamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahamromu|gokishamahamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahamunĂŒ|shamahamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahamnkmunĂŒ|goshamahamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahamunĂŒ|gokishamahamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahamushĂ«|shamahamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahamnkmushĂ«|goshamahamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahamushĂ«|gokishamahamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahamuro|shamahamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahamnkmuro|goshamahamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahamuro|gokishamahamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
